EmailTemplate.name: AES - Screening Pack Final Reminder
EmailTemplate.subject: Final reminder to proceed your application with Alliance Extra Staff
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
FINAL REMINDER TO PROCEED YOUR APPLICATION.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
We noticed you haven't submitted the Screening pack yet.
As we'd love to continue your journey to work with us, please follow the link below to let us know a bit more about you and when would be a good time to call and discuss your application.
OK, LET'S GET STARTED
If you have any questions, please feel free to call our friendly staff on 1300 662 511.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Extra Staff
